codeReview.summary: The commit fully applies the Axum 0.8 migration required by the feature: dependency bumps to axum/tower-http/tower, route syntax conversion to `{...}` in the app router and route-level integration test, and associated contract literal updates needed to keep Rust/frontend tests aligned. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill conflicts with mission/feature verification requirements around browser smoke checks, causing avoidable procedure deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/projects/csv-align/.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md:25 says to return to orchestrator instead of running agent-browser, while mission AGENTS requires agent-browser UI validation (/Users/vriesd/.factory/missions/8fa2796a-8b48-4fd7-a205-fbe53ec6442c/AGENTS.md:77) and this feature explicitly includes an agent-browser smoke step (/Users/vriesd/.factory/missions/8fa2796a-8b48-4fd7-a205-fbe53ec6442c/features.json:1279). Handoff skillFeedback records followedProcedure=false for this reason.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture notes still document pre-Axum-0.8 colon route syntax for compare requests, which no longer matches the implemented router conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/projects/csv-align/.factory/library/architecture.md:86 documents `POST /api/sessions/:sid/compare`, but runtime routes now use Axum 0.8 brace syntax as seen in src/main.rs (`/api/sessions/{session_id}/compare`).

summary: Reviewed mission records, transcript skeleton, rust-worker skill, and commit 0467f1d5af81de0363b32053a03093af5a3ad58c for m2-axum-0.8-upgrade. The implementation matches the requested migration scope and expected behavior, and no code defects were identified. Added shared-state observations for a skill/procedure mismatch and an outdated architecture note.
